meaning: adj.杀人的,造成死亡的,<口>非常危险的(或困难,难受)的
examples: Israel would continue its efforts to destroy the terrorist infrastructure, arrest those behind terrorist activities and harshly punish those who perpetrate these murderous activities.
How can we prevent murderous schoolyard violence in children who have access to weapons, poor parental supervision, and a mean streak?
Out of the murderous innocence of the sea.
Russet rooftops can just be spotted beneath the snow, dripping with exquisite, if murderous-looking, icicles.
Florida's law goes even further, as it presumes that any cat burglar has murderous intent.
